data.title: Publication of the 2025 annual report and convening notice for the Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meeting
data.description: Announcing the release of the annual report for 2025 along with the notice for the Ordinary and Extraordinary General Meeting. Shareholders are invited to attend to review the company's performance throughout the year. The report highlights key financial figures, including revenue of $1.5 billion and a net profit of $200 million. The meeting will take place on [date] at [location], where important decisions regarding the company's future will be discussed and voted on.

data.title: Invitation to Akropolis Group, UAB 2025 Financial Results Webinar
data.description: Akropolis Group, UAB is welcoming investors, analysts, and individuals interested in the company's operations to attend a virtual showcase of their financial outcomes for 2025. Scheduled for April 16 at 13:30 EEST, the presentation will be conducted in English. This opportunity allows insight into the company's performance and future prospects for stakeholders.

data.title: Orion publishes Interim Report for January–March 2026 and holds a webcast on 23 April 2026
data.description: Orion Corporation announced their Interim Report for the period of January-March 2026 will be released on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 12:00 noon EEST. A webcast will be held on the same day. The report and presentation materials will be posted on the company's website, www.orionpharma.com/investors.

data.title: Skanska constructs tech facility in USA for USD 142M, about SEK 1.3 billion
data.description: On April 10, 2026, it was announced that Skanska, based in Stockholm, has secured a deal with a current customer to build a technology center in the United States. The agreement holds a value of USD 142 million, equivalent to approximately SEK 1.3 billion. This project will be reflected in the company's US order bookings for Q1 2026. Construction is slated to commence shortly.

data.title: Bitcoin whales unload $271M in BTC, sparking concern for crypto rally. Traders absorbing supply may aid bulls in market momentum.
data.description: Over the weekend, large holders of Bitcoin offloaded a significant amount of $271 million worth of BTC. However, the consistent acquiring of this supply by traders is anticipated to support the upward trend in the market, enabling bullish investors to retain their control over the momentum.
